name: @xpert-ai/plugin-canvas
description: Canvas app plugin for agent-managed tldraw infinite canvases, image holders, annotation workflows, reviewable versions, and an editable workbench.

scripts.build:sandbox-action: node scripts/build-sandbox-action.mjs && node scripts/verify-sandbox-action.mjs && node scripts/test-sandbox-action.mjs
scripts.build: pnpm run build:ui && node scripts/build-remote-components.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.lib.json && node scripts/copy-assets.mjs && pnpm run build:sandbox-action
scripts.test: pnpm run build:ui && jest --config jest.config.ts && tsc -p tsconfig.spec.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.remote.json --noEmit && node scripts/build-remote-components.mjs --check
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build:ui && tsc -p tsconfig.spec.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.remote.json --noEmit && node scripts/build-remote-components.mjs --check
scripts.prepack: node scripts/sync-plugin-manifest-version.mjs && pnpm run build:ui && npm run build && node scripts/verify-package-output.mjs
